title: Rich Swann Re-Signs With TNA: 'I Really Believe In This Company'
summary: Former TNA World Heavyweight Champion Rich Swann reveals he has re-signed with TNA, primarily because he still believes in the company all these years later
imageAlt: Rich Swann Re-Signs With TNA: 'I Really Believe In This Company'
aiSummary: Former TNA World Heavyweight Champion Rich Swann reveals he has re-signed with TNA, primarily because he still believes in the company all these years later
keyPoints: Rich Swann Re-Signs With TNA: 'I Really Believe In This Company'
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.

multimedia.alt: Rich Swann Re-Signs With TNA: 'I Really Believe In This Company'
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada

fullArticle:
As 2026 has rolled along, a lot has been made about TNA losing talent, especially after several on air and offscreen personnel departed the promotion in June, moves that TNA referred to as "workforce reduction." But despite that, a few talents are deciding to stick with the promotion, including one of its long-time veterans, Rich Swann. In an interview with the "DailyStar," Swann revealed he had signed a new contract to stay with TNA, 9 months after rejoining them on a pay-per-appearance deal. His reasoning was his continued faith in TNA.

"I really believe in this company," Swann said. "I feel great. I feel like right now TNA is at the spot that it needs to be. We're killing it every Thursday night. And I'm just happy to be a part of that. I've been a part of Impact Wrestling and TNA sinc...
